changelog:
• Introduced the new SENTENCE Guide / SENTENCE LSP system with richer Luau, Roblox, UNC, sUNC, and Myriad-style autocomplete support.
• Added detailed function descriptions, usage guidance, hover documentation, signatures, and helper typings to improve scripting directly inside the editor.
• Refreshed the Sentence editor with a cleaner premium dark interface, improved spacing, slimmer navigation, and more consistent matte black/silver styling.
• Redesigned Script Explorer with a cleaner premium layout, improved folder/file presentation, smoother hover animations, better sorting, and fixed collapsed folders leaving empty scroll space.
• Simplified Script Explorer by removing unnecessary counters, filters, search bar, and heavy button backgrounds for a cleaner minimal workflow.
• Improved New File, New Folder, and GitHub import dialogs with a more modern premium style and fixed dispatcher errors when opening them.
• Updated Instance Explorer with a premium dark style, removed default blue selection/hover colors, improved readability, and matched its panel colors with the Script Preview Editor.
• Improved editor UI details including tabs, icons, corner radius, panel colors, hover effects, animations, scrollbars, and overall theme consistency.
